_meta.source_ref: Referensi visual: flyer C.O.IN.S / Coinslimited — 'On Track. On Time. Every Time' (foto pekerja logistik, area teks putih di atas, footer kontak biru).

keputusan_desain.aspect: 4:5 (1080x1350) — DIKONFIRMASI user (§0). Layout di-refit vertikal: area teks putih di atas ~42%, foto muncul di bawah.
keputusan_desain.background: Foto interaksi manusia = BACKGROUND full-bleed (templates.background_url, source 'background') — DIKONFIRMASI user. background_url SENGAJA dikosongkan di JSON agar upload admin tak tertimpa saat re-seed; sementara kosong → fallback warna.
keputusan_desain.scrim_putih: Overlay PUTIH dari atas (solid) memudar ke transparan ~62% → menciptakan area teks putih di atas sekaligus membiarkan foto tampak di bawah. Scrim LOCKED (tidak ikut brand) demi area teks tetap putih.
keputusan_desain.logo_tagline: Logo (icon) top-left = slot brand. Di sampingnya elemen 'tagline' (tipe BARU) yang menarik company_profile.tagline; value = placeholder 'Confirmed Option Integrated Services'.
keputusan_desain.pill: 'Fast. Reliable. Secured' = text STATIS ber-box (pill) accent, value configurable di JSON — DIKONFIRMASI user. Ikut brand (background accent).
keputusan_desain.no_cta: Tanpa CTA — DIKONFIRMASI user. cta opsional (README §4).
keputusan_desain.footer: Bar kontak biru: phone + sosial. 'Coinslimited' = handle brand (dari contact), bukan di-hardcode.

dipakai_template_ini: headline -> On Track. On Time. Every Time

brand_theme_doc.color: mode 'tint': accent <- brand_colors[0], dipakai elemen visible: headline accentWords ('On Track. On Time.'), pill background, footer gradient. Vibe di-anchor LOCKED: foto background + scrim putih + primary (near-black 'Every Time') + secondary (gray body). Brand apa pun tetap punya backbone putih/hitam => tidak merusak vibe.
brand_theme_doc.font: font_brand_roles: body boleh brand_font. headline & tagline tetap font template.

elements.value:
On Track. On Time.
Every Time
From pickup to shopfront, we keep every delivery right on track.
